ksa_text: Knowledge of model risk management regulatory requirements including Federal Reserve SR 11-7, OCC guidance, and supervisory expectations for model governance and independent validation.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of appropriate use policies and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Risk Management KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.434) to justify inclusion for the Director of Data Engineering. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.434 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Edge-domain Knowledge KSAs require more than moderate signal to justify inclusion; the role's scope does not regularly engage with Risk Management. Exclusion upheld.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Upheld: edge-domain exclusion maintained. Risk Management is not sufficiently central to the Director of Data Engineering to warrant inclusion at this signal level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Director of Data Engineering roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Risk Management is not a standard competency expectation for Director of Data Engineering. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of Data Engineering competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.434) and edge-domain placement (Risk Management) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of Data Engineering. All passes support exclusion.
